description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, compact design, situated on a rectangular plot of green lawn. The structure features a low-pitched, gray gable roof with a slight overhang and a combination of white and natural wood exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent set of three large, white-framed windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. A small porch or entryway is visible, partially sheltered by the roof extension, and the side of the house displays additional windows and a wooden accent section. The rear and side views reveal a simple, functional layout with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines. The property includes a paved driveway or walkway leading up to the entrance, and the overall appearance is neat and contemporary.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, white and wood exterior, and large front windows on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, large front windows, and a paved walkway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of three large windows and the main entry area.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back and side of the bungalow, with additional windows and a wooden accent wall.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing a simple back facade with a small window and the roof's overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
